originalTitle: The Shokz OpenRun Pro are the cheapest they’ve been since January
summary: Noise-canceling earbuds are great for flights and focusing, but they're not always ideal for outdoor workouts. The last-gen Shokz OpenRun Pro's open-ear design lets you enjoy music while staying aware of approaching cars, cyclists, and other potential hazards, and right now they're on sale for $109 ($50 off) at Amazon, Walmart, and B&H Photo. That […]
content: Noise-canceling earbuds are great for flights and focusing, but they’re not always ideal for outdoor workouts. The last-gen Shokz OpenRun Pro’s open-ear design lets you enjoy music while staying aware of approaching cars, cyclists, and other potential hazards, and right now they’re on sale for $109 ($50 off) at Amazon, Walmart, and B&H Photo. That matches their all-time low price, which we haven’t seen since January. [Product: Shokz OpenRun Pro | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09BVXT8TJ/?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FShokz-OpenRun-Pro-Premium-Bone-Conduction-Open-Ear-Bluetooth-Headphones-for-Sports-with-Cooling-Wristband-Black%2F997292021] Unlike traditional earbuds, the OpenRun Pro rests just outside your ears and uses bone conduction to deliver sound. That means you can listen to music or podcasts while still hearing what’s going on around you, offering extra peace of mind in busy areas or when it’s getting dark. The lightweight titanium wraparound frame is designed to stay secure during runs and other workouts, and an IP55 rating means you don’t have to worry about getting caught in a little rain. You also get up to 10 hours of battery life and multipoint Bluetooth support, allowing you to stay connected to two devices at once. That said, these are no longer Shokz’ flagship headphones, so you do miss out on a few upgrades. Notably, the OpenRun Pro 2 delivers noticeably richer bass — a long-standing problem with bone conduction headphones  — along with USB-C charging and AI-powered noise cancellation. At $179, though, they’re also significantly more expensive. If it’s the open-ear design that appeals to you most and you want to save, the original OpenRun Pro remains a good investment.
chineseTitle: Shokz OpenRun Pro 是自 1 月份以来最便宜的价格
chineseSummary: 降噪耳塞非常适合飞行和集中注意力，但它们并不总是适合户外锻炼。最新一代 Shokz OpenRun Pro 的开放式设计让您在享受音乐的同时，还能留意驶近的汽车、骑自行车的人和其他潜在危险，目前它们在 Amazon、Walmart 和 B&H Photo 的售价为 109 美元（折扣 50 美元）。那 […]
chineseContent: 降噪耳塞非常适合飞行和集中注意力，但它们并不总是适合户外锻炼。最新一代 Shokz OpenRun Pro 的开放式设计让您在享受音乐的同时，还能留意驶近的汽车、骑自行车的人和其他潜在危险，目前它们在 Amazon、Walmart 和 B&H Photo 的售价为 109 美元（折扣 50 美元）。这与他们的历史最低价格相符，这是自一月份以来我们从未见过的。 [产品：Shokz OpenRun Pro | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09BVXT8TJ/?tag=theverge02-20， https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FShokz-OpenRun-Pro-P remium 骨传导开耳式蓝牙耳机运动带散热腕带-黑色%2F997292021]与传统耳塞不同，OpenRun Pro 位于您的耳外，并使用骨传导来传送声音。这意味着您可以在听音乐或播客的同时仍然听到周围发生的事情，在繁忙地区或天黑时提供额外的安心。轻质钛合金环绕式框架旨在在跑步和其他锻炼过程中保持安全，IP55 防护等级意味着您不必担心被小雨淋到。您还可以获得长达 10 小时的电池续航时间和多点蓝牙支持，让您可以同时与两个设备保持连接。也就是说，这些不再是 Shokz 的旗舰耳机，所以你确实错过了一些升级。值得注意的是，OpenRun Pro 2 提供了明显更丰富的低音（骨传导耳机长期存在的问题），以及 USB-C 充电和人工智能降噪功能。不过，它们的售价为 179 美元，价格也贵得多。如果开放式耳机设计最吸引您并且您想省钱，那么原版 OpenRun Pro 仍然是一项不错的投资。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
